arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes responds to latest Andre Onana blunder in Europa League
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes speaks after Andre Onana's latest error in Man Utd's 2-1 win over Viktoria Plzen in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Player set for winter return to Wolves – Move hasn’t worked out well for him
arts.sum: Nathan Fraser graduated from Wolverhampton Wanderers’ youth system and only made a few appearances for their senior team. In order to let the striker continue his development, the Premier League side allowed him to join Zulte Waregem on a loan deal in the summer window. According to Walfoot, the temporary move has clearly not worked The post Player set for winter return to Wolves – Move hasn’t worked out well for him appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Luke Littler makes Man Utd demand as darts star fumes at Andre Onana
arts.sum: Darts star Luke Littler has made his feelings clear after goalkeeper Andre Onana had another moment to forget in Manchester United's Europa League win at Viktoria Plzen

arts.ttl: Friday's Transfer Talk Update: Franco Mastantuono, Liam Delap, Jules Kounde
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Wolves 'united' behind manager O'Neil - chairman Shi
arts.sum: Wolves chairman Jeff Shi acknowledges results need to improve but says the club is "united" behind under-pressure manager Gary O'Neil.

arts.ttl: Wolves lineup vs. Ipswich: Predicted XI for Premier League relegation showdown
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Wolverhampton Wanderers could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Ipswich lineup vs. Wolves: Predicted XI for Premier League relegation showdown
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Ipswich Town could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Ipswich Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Wolverhampton Wanderers and Ipswich Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Man United players have 'huge belief' in Andre Onana despite his latest blunder, claims Bruno Fernandes... after he backed up Nottingham Forest howler by gifting Viktoria Plzen a goal
arts.sum: This time, away to Viktoria Plzen, Man United No 1 Andre Onana completely miscalculated a pass out from the back to Matthjis de Ligt, allowing the Czech side to nip in and tap into an empty net.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund spares Andre Onana blushes as Man Utd beat Viktoria Plzen - 6 talking points
arts.sum: VIKTORIA PLZEN 1-2 MAN UTD: The Red Devils were forced to come from behind in Czechia after a shocking mistake from goalkeeper Andre Onana gifted the hosts the lead in the Europa League
